\tzpentry{ID4703}{Modal Frequency Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4703 introduces Modal Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\\omega_{nl} = \\frac{c_s}{R} \\xi_{nl} \\sqrt{1 + \\left(\\frac{\\omega_\\text{gyro}}{\\omega_{nl}}\\right)^2 \\ell(\\ell+1)}\n\\end{equation}
